title: ProvenanceAttestation
description: A tamper-evident, hash-chained record of a dataset's chain of custody, plus a SHA-256 digest of its canonical core. Mirrors EXACTLY the object produced by buildAttestation() in js/provenance.js. This is a cryptographic integrity record only — NOT a notarization, and NOT a legal, clinical, or regulatory determination. The `version` field here is the attestation document format version (integer 1), distinct from the semver protocol version.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying this document as a DATAGLOW provenance attestation.

algorithm.description: Hashing construction used, e.g. "SHA-256 hash chain (Merkle-style linked hashes)".

genesisParent.description: All-zero anchor for the genesis step's parentHash.

covers.description: Which fields the digest commits to.

status.description: Honest status label, e.g. "digest-ready-for-notarization". Never claims "notarized" unless independently notarized.

detail.description: Optional structured detail; any JSON value or null.

contentHash.description: Optional hash of a data snapshot this step commits to (e.g. raw file bytes on load).

ts.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the step was recorded.
